{"id":"nms_optimizer-web-m4n.2","title":"Profile Performance Bottlenecks","description":"Identify and profile specific performance bottlenecks (e.g., long tasks, render-blocking resources, excessive DOM size) using Lighthouse insights and Chrome DevTools.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"John Belew","owner":"john.belew@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T22:08:18Z","created_by":"John Belew","updated_at":"2026-03-02T22:26:02Z"}

new_value: Identified multiple bottlenecks: 1. Sentry/Analytics initialization blocking bootup. 2. Eager loading of MainAppContent and GridTable in critical path. 3. Large React/Radix chunks causing long tasks (up to 498ms). 4. Immediate detectAdBlocker network request on module load.

old_value: {"id":"nms_optimizer-web-m4n.3","title":"Refactor Main Thread Long Tasks","description":"Identify and optimize scripts causing high Total Blocking Time (TBT). This includes breaking up long-running JS tasks to improve interactivity.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"john.belew@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T22:08:21Z","created_by":"John Belew","updated_at":"2026-03-02T22:24:56Z"}

{"id":"nms_optimizer-web-m4n.3","title":"Refactor Main Thread Long Tasks","description":"Identify and optimize scripts causing high Total Blocking Time (TBT). This includes breaking up long-running JS tasks to improve interactivity.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"John Belew","owner":"john.belew@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T22:08:21Z","created_by":"John Belew","updated_at":"2026-03-02T22:31:32Z"}

new_value: Optimized bootup sequence by: 1. Deferring Sentry, Analytics, and Service Worker initialization to idle time/after first paint. 2. Lazy-loading MainAppContent in routes. 3. Removing immediate ad-blocker detection on module load. These changes reduce the initial JS execution and main-thread blocking during hydration.

old_value: {"id":"nms_optimizer-web-m4n.5","title":"Optimize Asset Delivery and Bundle Size","description":"Analyze and reduce JS/CSS bundle sizes, implement better code-splitting, and optimize critical path resources to improve FCP and LCP.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"john.belew@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T22:24:59Z","created_by":"John Belew","updated_at":"2026-03-02T22:24:59Z"}

{"id":"nms_optimizer-web-m4n.5","title":"Optimize Asset Delivery and Bundle Size","description":"Analyze and reduce JS/CSS bundle sizes, implement better code-splitting, and optimize critical path resources to improve FCP and LCP.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"John Belew","owner":"john.belew@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T22:24:59Z","created_by":"John Belew","updated_at":"2026-03-02T22:32:59Z"}

new_value: Refined Vite manualChunks strategy to: 1. Separate react-core from react-dom. 2. Extract heavy Radix primitives (Dialog, Tooltip, Toast) into their own chunks. 3. Isolated common utilities. This improves granularity, reduces the impact of any single 'long task' script, and enhances long-term cacheability of core libraries.
